---
title: "STEPWISE escenari nul"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-03-30"
output: html_document
---
# Stepwise nul
```{r}

setwd("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos")
load("D:/Documentos/TFG/TFG-Selecci-de-variables-en-escenaris-complexos/dades_escenari_nul.RData")

# Resultats
resultats_sw <- data.frame(
  N = integer(),
  pi = numeric(),
  correlation = numeric(),
  FP = numeric(),
  FP_percent = numeric()
)

# Funció auxiliar per comptar variables seleccionades
compta_vars_step <- function(model) {
  coeficients <- summary(model)$coefficients
  nvar <- nrow(coeficients) - 1
  if (nvar < 0) nvar <- 0
  return(nvar)
}

# Iteracions
system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {
    
    N <- comb$N[i]
    pi <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- comb$correlation[i]
    
    fp_stepwise <- numeric(iters)
    
    for (j in 1:iters) {
      
      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j, "\n")
      
      # Dades
      X_sub <- X[[i]][[j]]
      Y_bin <- Y[[i]][[j]]
      dades <- data.frame(Y = Y_bin, X_sub)
      
      # Model nul i complet
      nulmodel <- glm(Y ~ 1, data = dades, family = binomial)
      fullmodel <- glm(Y ~ ., data = dades, family = binomial)
      
      # Stepwise (direcció bidireccional)
      stepmodel <- step(
        nulmodel,
        scope = list(lower = nulmodel, upper = fullmodel),
        direction = "both",
        trace = 0
      )
      
      # Comptem variables seleccionades
      fp_stepwise[j] <- compta_vars_step(stepmodel)
    }
    
    # Guardem resultats per escenari
    resultats_sw <- rbind(
      resultats_sw,
      data.frame(
        N = N,
        pi = pi,
        correlation = correlation,
        FP = mean(fp_stepwise),
        FP_percent = mean(fp_stepwise) / num_vars
      )
    )
  }
})

# Mostra i desa resultats
print(resultats_sw)
save(resultats_sw, file = "resultats_sw_nul.RData")
```
